name: cmsis-csolution
description: Create embedded and Edge AI projects for Arm Cortex-M based devices using the Common Microcontroller Software Interface Standard (CMSIS) and csolution format
author: Jens Reinecke <jens.reinecke@arm.com>

viewsWelcome.contents:
Create a solution from scratch, import an example, or open an existing μVision project to convert it to a CMSIS solution. 
 [Create Solution](command:cmsis-csolution.createSolution)
 [Convert a μVision Project to CMSIS Solution](command:cmsis-csolution.convertMicroVisionToCsolution)
 Need help? [Verify the Installation](https://mdk-packs.github.io/vscode-cmsis-solution-docs/installation.html#verify-the-installation) or explore the [overview](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Arm.cmsis-csolution).

Create a solution from scratch, import an example, or open an existing μVision project to convert it to a CMSIS solution. 
 [Open Solution in Workspace](command:cmsis-csolution.openSolution)
 [Create Solution](command:cmsis-csolution.createSolution)
 [Convert a μVision Project to CMSIS Solution](command:cmsis-csolution.convertMicroVisionToCsolution)
 Need help? [Verify the Installation](https://mdk-packs.github.io/vscode-cmsis-solution-docs/installation.html#verify-the-installation) or explore the [overview](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Arm.cmsis-csolution).

Select a project in the Build Context editor to get started. 
 [Open Build Context Editor](command:cmsis-csolution.manageSolution)

solution.description: Path to the csolution.yml to build

downloadPacks.description: Download missing software packs with cpackget

schemaCheck.description: Validate project input file(s) against schema

rebuild.description: Remove intermediate and output directories and rebuild

setup.description: Setup the build directory and intellisense information

jobs.description: Number of job slots for parallel execution

updateRte.description: Update the RTE directory and files

commands.title: Path and Name to csolution.yml File of Active Solution
Convert a μVision Project to CMSIS Solution…
Path and Name of First ELF/DWARF File in Active Target
Path and Name of ELF/DWARF Files (Comma Separated) in Active Target
Processor Name (pname) of Active Project; for Multi-Processor Configurations start-pname
Device Name of Active Target as Specified in csolution.yml
Board Name of Active Target as Specified in csolution.yml
Install Pack for Given Vendor, Name, and Version
Add Groups or Files (Only for Groups)
Device Family Pack (DFP) Used in Active Target
Board Support Pack (BSP) Used in Active Target
Path to Content of DFP Used in Active Target
Path to Content of BSP Used in Active Target
Path to CMSIS Pack Root Directory, i.e., CMSIS_PACK_ROOT Environment Variable or OS Default
Path to cbuild-run.yml File of Active Target
Path to output directory of active clangd information
Update Debug Tasks and Launch Configurations
Get Name of Active Run and Debug Configuration (Format: target-type@set)

view/title.when: view == cmsis-csolution.outline && cmsis-csolution.activeSolutionState == active && cmsis-csolution.buildState == idle
view == cmsis-csolution.outline && cmsis-csolution.activeSolutionState == active && cmsis-csolution.buildState == building
view == cmsis-csolution.outline && cmsis-csolution.activeSolutionState == active && (cmsis-csolution.executionState == idle || cmsis-csolution.executionState == unconfigured)

view == cmsis-csolution.outline && cmsis-csolution.activeSolutionState == active && (cmsis-csolution.executionState == running || cmsis-csolution.executionState == debugging || cmsis-csolution.executionState == loading || cmsis-csolution.executionState == erasing)
view == cmsis-csolution.outline && cmsis-csolution.activeSolutionState == active && (cmsis-csolution.executionState != running && cmsis-csolution.executionState != debugging)

view/item/context.when: view == cmsis-csolution.outline && viewItem =~ /^projectFile/ && viewItem not in cmsis-csolution.activeClangdContext
view == cmsis-csolution.outline && viewItem =~ /^projectFile/ && viewItem in cmsis-csolution.activeClangdContext

explorer/context.when: (resourcePath =~ /.+\.csolution\.ya?ml$/ && resourcePath not in cmsis-csolution.activeSolution) || (explorerResourceIsFolder && resourceFilename in cmsis-csolution.solutionRoots)

cmsis-csolution.generateClangSetup.description: Automatically generate for the active csolution context the required setup (.clangd file and .vscode/settings.json). For AC6 compiler include pre-defined macros in the .clangd file.

cmsis-csolution.exclude.markdownDescription: Configure a [glob pattern](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/editor/glob-patterns) for excluding files and folders in searches for csolution files.

cmsis-csolution.outputDirectory.description: Enter an output directory prefix for 'outdir' and 'tmpdir' and relocated build information files (experimental).

cmsis-csolution.useWebServices.description: Use web services to obtain information about devices, boards, and examples. If enabled, information from the internet database and installed packs is used. If disabled, only information from installed packs is used.

cmsis-csolution.downloadPacks.markdownDescription: The CMSIS-Toolbox downloads required software packs using cpackget during setup and project build. This option enables the option ```--packs``` for [cbuild](https://open-cmsis-pack.github.io/cmsis-toolbox/build-tools/#cbuild-invocation).

cmsis-csolution.autoDebugLaunch.markdownDescription: Create or update `launch.json` and `tasks.json` with the Debug Adapter configuration of the CMSIS solution project. When disabled, the files `launch.json` and `tasks.json` are no longer modified. (Note: also available in Manage Solution Settings dialog).

cmsis-csolution.probe-id.markdownDescription: Specify the unique identifier of a debug probe to connect on your host computer (typically its serial number). Leave empty to connect to the first debug probe that matches the specified type. Try using [Target Information](command:cmsis-csolution.cmsisTargetInfo) with your debug adapter connected.

cmsis-csolution.environmentVariables.markdownDescription: Specify additional environment variables to be set for build, run, and terminals.

updateConfiguration.description: Set to auto allows the extension to update the configuration file automatically. Set to manual to disable automatic updates.
enumDescriptions: Allow the extension to update the configuration file automatically.

updateConfiguration.description: Set to auto allows the extension to update the configuration file automatically. Set to manual to disable automatic updates.
enumDescriptions: Allow the extension to update the configuration file automatically.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Access to the CMSIS pack cache and local tools is required
